blocks.heading: Folded, not printed
blocks.tagline: The design belongs to the developer. The words belong to you.

blocks.heading: Images sit beside your words
blocks.body:
Upload a photo in the editor and it appears here, framed in paper. Until you add one, a crease pattern holds its place — so the layout never looks broken while you're still writing.

Flip the switch in the editor to move the image to the other side.

blocks.heading: Writing works the way you expect
blocks.body:
The text editor supports the usual things:

* **Bold** and *italic* text
* Bulleted and numbered lists
* Links, like this one to the [home page](/)
